zh.lifeSummary: 當John Wilson於大約1487年出生在英國蘇格蘭度福利斯 安德 加洛韋時，他的父親Patrick Robert Wilson33歲，母親Lady Emily Clara FitzPatrick - Lady Wilson28歲。他和Jonet Leyis至少有1個兒子。他去世於1577年9月19日在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安享年91歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Wilson于大约1487年出生在英国苏格兰度福利斯 安德 加洛韋时，他的父亲Patrick Robert Wilson33岁，母亲Lady Emily Clara FitzPatrick - Lady Wilson28岁。他和Jonet Leyis至少有1个儿子。他去世于1577年9月19日在苏格兰米德洛迪安享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wilson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Will + patronymic -son ‘son of Will’. Will was a very common medieval short form of William . This surname is also very common among African Americans.

variants.name: Will
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Will, a short form of William . This surname is now commonly found in Scotland, in Aberdeenshire, Angus, and Kincardineshire.

English: topographic name for someone who lived by a spring or stream, from Middle English wel, wel(l)e, wille, in a southwestern dialect form. This surname is found predominantly in the south and southwestern parts of the country. Compare Well 1.
English: nickname from Middle English iwil, wil(l)e ‘agreeable, pleasing’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John Wilson was born about 1487, in Dumfries and Galloway, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Patrick Robert Wilson, was 33 and his mother, Lady Emily Clara FitzPatrick - Lady Wilson, was 28. He had at least 1 son with Jonet Leyis. He died on 19 September 1577, in Midlothian, Scotland, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Wilson est né environ 1487, à Dumfries and Galloway, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Patrick Robert Wilson, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Lady Emily Clara FitzPatrick - Lady Wilson, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Jonet Leyis. Il est décédé le 19 septembre 1577, à Midlothian, Écosse, à l’âge de 91 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Wilson um 1487 in Dumfries and Galloway, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Patrick Robert Wilson 33 und seine Mutter Lady Emily Clara FitzPatrick - Lady Wilson 28. Er hatte mit Jonet Leyis mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 19. September 1577 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Midlothian, Scotland.

Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Jonet Leyis. Morì il 19 settembre 1577, nel Midlothian, Scotland, all'età di 91 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Wilsonが約1487年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーズ アンド ガロワイで生まれた時，父Patrick Robert Wilsonは33歳，母Lady Emily Clara FitzPatrick - Lady Wilsonは28歳であった。彼はJonet Leyisとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1577年9月19日にスコットランドミドロスアンで91歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Wilson(이)가 대략 1487년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Patrick Robert Wilson(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Emily Clara FitzPatrick - Lady Wilson(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Jonet Leyis(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1577년 9월 19일 스컷랜드 미들로스이언에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Wilson родился около 1487 г. в местности думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Patrick Robert Wilson было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Emily Clara FitzPatrick - Lady Wilson, 28. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Jonet Leyis. Он умер 19 сентября 1577 г. в местности мидлотян, Шотландия в возрасте 91 год.
